issues.detail: The skill file lacks specific instructions, making it vague.
Only happy path examples are provided, missing error handling and edge cases.
Excessive explanatory text leads to verbosity.
The skill lacks step-by-step actionable instructions for the agent.

scenarios.name: High-count particle system at 60fps
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic atlas/pooling advice and misses ParticleContainer; treatment uses ParticleContainer, pre-allocated pooling, and shared atlas batching exactly as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Animated water displacement filter
scenarios.rationale: Baseline drifts to custom shaders; treatment wires DisplacementFilter with addressMode='repeat' and ticker-driven sprite motion per the skill.
